学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 74th on the 2026 Soft Science main list, with stable rankings in the 69–78 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of comprehensive universities nationwide. The 2026 reputation evaluation is relatively positive, mainly due to Nanchang University's men's volleyball team winning the championship in the 2025–2026 Chinese University Volleyball League Finals, significantly enhancing the university's sports reputation and public attention. Douyin popularity ranking is 43rd (relatively hot), with short video exposure mainly featuring positive content such as volleyball championships and campus environment. In terms of historical admission anomalies, there was a signal of low attention compared to Wuhan University in 2023, but it did not constitute a sustained negative impact. 专业热度与地域.text: Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation (highly recommended, 74.28), Clinical Medicine (recommended, 70.19), and other majors continue to have high social popularity, driving overall application attention. Nanchang University is located in Nanchang City, Jiangxi Province, a comprehensive university in the central region, with a small enrollment scale in Qinghai Province (17 students in the science group), and cross-province applications are limited by regional preferences. The university has no local enrollment bias in Qinghai Province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the narrow fluctuation and backward trend of historical rankings in the recent three years, the 2026 enrollment plan unchanged from 2025, the relatively positive university reputation and increased application attention due to Douyin popularity, and the sustained high popularity of hot majors such as Electronic Information and Clinical Medicine, it is expected that competition in 2026 will be slightly more intense than in 2025.
